ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "married_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer (e.g., Married, Single) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (e.g., Female, Male) */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children the customer has */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Education level of the customer (foreign key to education table) */,
  "occupation" INTEGER /* Occupation of the customer (foreign key to occupations table) */,
  "home_owner" TEXT /* Whether the customer owns a home (Yes/No) */,
  "cars" INTEGER /* Number of cars the customer owns */,
  "commute_distance" TEXT /* Commute distance of the customer (e.g., 0-1 Miles, 2-5 Miles) */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region the customer is from (foreign key to regions table) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "age_bracket" INTEGER /* Age bracket of the customer (foreign key to age_brackets table) */,
  "purchased_bike" TEXT /* Whether the customer has purchased a bike (Yes/No) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spend" TEXT /* Total amount the customer has spent */,
  "clv" TEXT /* Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) */,
  "loyalty_program_member" TEXT /* Whether the customer is a member of a loyalty program (Yes/No) */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of customer referral (e.g., Social Media, Friend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_age_bracket FOREIGN KEY ("age_bracket") REFERENCES age_brackets ("age_bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., Bachelors, Partial College) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "average_income" TEXT /* Average income for this education level */,
  "common_occupations" TEXT /* Common occupations associated with this education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Occupation name (e.g., Skilled Manual, Clerical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "average_income" TEXT /* Average income for this occupation */,
  "common_education_levels" TEXT /* Common education levels associated with this occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Region name (e.g., Europe, Pacific) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "average_income" TEXT /* Average income of the region */,
  "common_occupations" TEXT /* Common occupations in the region */,
  "common_education_levels" TEXT /* Common education levels in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_brackets" (
  "age_bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age bracket */,
  "age_bracket" TEXT /* Age bracket (e.g., Middle Age, Old) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age bracket */,
  "average_income" TEXT /* Average income for this age bracket */,
  "common_occupations" TEXT /* Common occupations associated with this age bracket */,
  "common_education_levels" TEXT /* Common education levels associated with this age bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_bracket_id")
)
